name: High Vibration
description: Excessive vibration exceeding alarm setpoint on rotating machinery

name: Valve Slow Operation
description: Valve stroke time exceeding specified limits

name: External Leakage
description: External leakage from process equipment or piping

name: Fouling
description: Internal fouling reducing heat transfer or flow capacity

name: Corrosion Wall Loss
description: Internal or external corrosion causing wall thickness loss

name: Instrument Drift
description: Instrument reading drifting outside acceptable calibration tolerance

name: Communication Loss
description: Loss of communication signal from subsea or remote equipment
